name: skill-creator-generic
description: Create a new agent skill OR modify an existing one, in a personal marketplace (Type A, stable or beta), as a personal standalone (Type B), or for another tool compatible with agentskills.io (Type C). Identity-free and runtime-configured. Separates the GitHub repo name from the marketplace identifier so that two users with the same repo name never collide inside Claude Code. Auto-detects reference files, preserves the slug on modification, snapshots before editing.

author.name: flo351 (original generic skill-creator), Samuel Audette (collision-safe fork)
